## Screenshot-driven issues addressed

- Desktop duplicated nav/header risk
- Mobile menu visible by default over hero
- Mobile drawer z-index and closed/open state
- Hero text contrast on pale panels
- Mobile H1 splitting mid-word
- Floating CTA / WhatsApp overlap risk
- Duplicate stylesheet/script references
- False architecture component declarations
- Partials validated separately from real pages

## Section architecture mismatches repaired or reported

### `concepts/01-inspire/404.html`

- Section `03` declared `copy-media-actions` / `copy-media-grid` / `sticky-cta` but actual DOM is `copy-media-actions` / `copy-media-grid`.
  - declares form-led/form-first architecture but no real form exists
  - fix: normalized component declaration to actual DOM: copy-media-actions
- Section `04` declared `card-row-with-media` / `copy-cards-media-grid` / `process-stepper` but actual DOM is `card-row-with-media` / `copy-cards-media-grid`.
  - declares form-led/form-first architecture but no real form exists
  - fix: normalized component declaration to actual DOM: card-row-with-media

## Next manual visual check

- Desktop should show one nav system, not duplicated left/right full menus.
- Mobile should not show the drawer links until the Menu button is clicked.
- Hero title should not split inside the word `Personalized`.
- Hero text should be readable on every concept.
- Floating Consultation/WhatsApp should not cover primary hero buttons.
